mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_outbound_subscription(tenant_id, org_id, channel_id, name, enabled, event_types, filter_json, transform_json, is_delete, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{orgId}, #{channelId}, #{name}, #{enabled}, #{eventTypes}, #{filterJson}, #{transformJson}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_outbound_subscription WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM iot_outbound_subscription WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iot_outbound_subscription WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} AND is_delete = 0

SELECT s.id AS subscription_id, s.org_id AS subscription_org_id, s.event_types, s.filter_json, s.transform_json, c.id AS channel_id, c.type AS channel_type, c.config_json AS channel_config_json FROM iot_outbound_subscription s INNER JOIN iot_outbound_channel c ON s.channel_id = c.id WHERE s.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND s.enabled = 1 AND c.enabled = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND c.is_delete = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_outbound_subscription SET name = #{name}, enabled = #{enabled}, event_types = #{eventTypes}, filter_json = #{filterJson}, transform_json = #{transformJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE iot_outbound_subscription SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
